description_long: This is a modern freestanding bathroom vanity cabinet with a light wood finish and black metal legs. The left side features two large drawers with sleek black handles, while the right side has two open shelves for accessible storage. A white ceramic vessel sink sits atop the left side, paired with a tall, angular chrome faucet. The back and sides are plain wood, while the front reveals the functional storage elements and plumbing beneath the sink. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban bathrooms or washrooms.
description: A modern light wood bathroom vanity with drawers, open shelves, a vessel sink, and black metal legs. Features a minimalist design with visible storage and a chrome faucet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet, the round vessel sink, and the faucet profile.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two drawers with black handles, open shelves, and the vessel sink with faucet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wood finish and the sink's position at the end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel, open drawer, and exposed plumbing under the sink.
